repositories.title: google-labs-code / design.md
repositories.description: A format specification for describing a visual identity to coding agents. DESIGN.md gives agents a persistent, structured understanding of a design system.
repositories.summary: Defines a DESIGN.md format for describing a visual identity to coding agents. Combines machine-readable design tokens with human-readable design rationale. Includes linting to validate structure, token references, and contrast ratios. Provides a diff command to compare design system versions for regressions.
summary_bullets: Defines a DESIGN.md format for describing a visual identity to coding agents.
Combines machine-readable design tokens with human-readable design rationale.
Includes linting to validate structure, token references, and contrast ratios.
Provides a diff command to compare design system versions for regressions.

repositories.title: calesthio / OpenMontage
repositories.description: World's first open-source, agentic video production system. 12 pipelines, 52 tools, 500+ agent skills. Turn your AI coding assistant into a full video production studio.
repositories.summary: An open-source agentic video production system that turns prompts into finished videos. Can research, script, generate assets, edit, and compose videos into a final render. Supports both image-based animation workflows and real footage documentary-style workflows. Works with multiple AI and media providers, with prompts and pipelines for different video types.
summary_bullets: An open-source agentic video production system that turns prompts into finished videos.
Can research, script, generate assets, edit, and compose videos into a final render.
Supports both image-based animation workflows and real footage documentary-style workflows.
Works with multiple AI and media providers, with prompts and pipelines for different video types.

repositories.title: xbtlin / ai-berkshire
repositories.description: AI 时代的伯克希尔：基于 Claude Code 的价值投资研究框架。巴菲特·芒格·段永平·李录四大师方法论 + 多Agent并行研究。| AI-era Berkshire: a value investing research framework built on Claude Code. 4 masters' methodologies + multi-agent adversarial analysis.
repositories.summary: A value-investing research framework built for Claude Code. Organizes research around methods from Buffett, Munger, Li Lu, and Dan YP. Uses multi-agent workflows, checklists, and financial validation tools for structured analysis. Focuses on disciplined buy decisions, valuation, and portfolio tracking.
summary_bullets: A value-investing research framework built for Claude Code.
Organizes research around methods from Buffett, Munger, Li Lu, and Dan YP.
Uses multi-agent workflows, checklists, and financial validation tools for structured analysis.
Focuses on disciplined buy decisions, valuation, and portfolio tracking.

repositories.title: mauriceboe / TREK
repositories.description: A self-hosted travel/trip planner with real-time collaboration, interactive maps, PWA support, SSO, budgets, packing lists, and more.
repositories.summary: A self-hosted collaborative travel planner for trips, budgets, packing, notes, and maps. Supports real-time multi-user trip planning with role-based access and invite links. Includes reservations, expenses, packing lists, documents, weather, and route optimization. Provides mobile and PWA support plus built-in AI and MCP integration.
summary_bullets: A self-hosted collaborative travel planner for trips, budgets, packing, notes, and maps.
Supports real-time multi-user trip planning with role-based access and invite links.
Includes reservations, expenses, packing lists, documents, weather, and route optimization.
Provides mobile and PWA support plus built-in AI and MCP integration.

repositories.title: apple / container
repositories.description: A tool for creating and running Linux containers using lightweight virtual machines on a Mac. It is written in Swift, and optimized for Apple silicon.
repositories.summary: A Mac tool for running Linux containers as lightweight virtual machines on Apple silicon. Consumes and produces OCI-compatible images, so it works with standard container registries. Runs as a system service and supports install, upgrade, downgrade, and uninstall workflows. Requires macOS 26 and is still under active development.
summary_bullets: A Mac tool for running Linux containers as lightweight virtual machines on Apple silicon.
Consumes and produces OCI-compatible images, so it works with standard container registries.
Runs as a system service and supports install, upgrade, downgrade, and uninstall workflows.
Requires macOS 26 and is still under active development.

repositories.title: JCodesMore / ai-website-cloner-template
repositories.description: Clone any website with one command using AI coding agents
repositories.summary: A template for reverse-engineering a website into a modern Next.js codebase using AI agents. Guides agents through reconnaissance, token extraction, component specs, and parallel rebuilding. Includes workflows for cloning sites you own and rebuilding them section by section. Provides project structure, agent instructions, and scripts for syncing those instructions across platforms.
summary_bullets: A template for reverse-engineering a website into a modern Next.js codebase using AI agents.
Guides agents through reconnaissance, token extraction, component specs, and parallel rebuilding.
Includes workflows for cloning sites you own and rebuilding them section by section.
Provides project structure, agent instructions, and scripts for syncing those instructions across platforms.

repositories.title: garrytan / gstack
repositories.description: Use Garry Tan's exact Claude Code setup: 23 opinionated tools that serve as CEO, Designer, Eng Manager, Release Manager, Doc Engineer, and QA
repositories.summary: A Claude Code workflow system designed to help one builder operate like a team. Provides slash commands for planning, review, QA, shipping, design, debugging, and more. Encodes a sprint-like process from research and planning through execution, review, and release. Targets founders, tech leads, and anyone using AI agents for structured software delivery.
summary_bullets: A Claude Code workflow system designed to help one builder operate like a team.
Provides slash commands for planning, review, QA, shipping, design, debugging, and more.
Encodes a sprint-like process from research and planning through execution, review, and release.
Targets founders, tech leads, and anyone using AI agents for structured software delivery.

repositories.title: aws / agent-toolkit-for-aws
repositories.description: Official, AWS-supported MCP servers, skills, and plugins to help AI agents build on AWS
repositories.summary: An AWS toolkit for AI coding agents to build, deploy, and manage applications on AWS. Packages AWS guidance, guardrails, skills, and MCP support for multiple agents. Includes plugins for core AWS workflows, AI agents, data analytics, and DevSecOps. Aims to make agent-driven AWS work safer, more consistent, and easier to operate.
summary_bullets: An AWS toolkit for AI coding agents to build, deploy, and manage applications on AWS.
Packages AWS guidance, guardrails, skills, and MCP support for multiple agents.
Includes plugins for core AWS workflows, AI agents, data analytics, and DevSecOps.
Aims to make agent-driven AWS work safer, more consistent, and easier to operate.

repositories.title: mukul975 / Anthropic-Cybersecurity-Skills
repositories.description: 817 structured cybersecurity skills for AI agents · Mapped to 6 frameworks: MITRE ATT&CK, NIST CSF 2.0, MITRE ATLAS, D3FEND, NIST AI RMF & MITRE F3 (Fight Fraud) · agentskills.io standard · Works with Claude Code, GitHub Copilot, Codex CLI, Cursor, Gemini CLI & 20+ platforms · 29 security domains · Apache 2.0
repositories.summary: A large open-source cybersecurity skills library for AI agents. Provides structured workflows across many security domains like cloud, DFIR, malware, and web security. Maps skills to frameworks including ATT&CK, NIST CSF, ATLAS, D3FEND, AI RMF, and F3. Designed to give agents practitioner-style playbooks instead of generic security advice.
summary_bullets: A large open-source cybersecurity skills library for AI agents.
Provides structured workflows across many security domains like cloud, DFIR, malware, and web security.
Maps skills to frameworks including ATT&CK, NIST CSF, ATLAS, D3FEND, AI RMF, and F3.
Designed to give agents practitioner-style playbooks instead of generic security advice.

repositories.title: alibaba / page-agent
repositories.description: JavaScript in-page GUI agent. Control web interfaces with natural language.
repositories.summary: A GUI agent that lives inside a web page and responds to natural language. Uses in-page JavaScript for DOM manipulation instead of screenshots or headless browser control. Supports SaaS copilots, smart form filling, accessibility, and multi-page browser tasks. Offers an optional Chrome extension and an MCP server for outside control.
summary_bullets: A GUI agent that lives inside a web page and responds to natural language.
Uses in-page JavaScript for DOM manipulation instead of screenshots or headless browser control.
Supports SaaS copilots, smart form filling, accessibility, and multi-page browser tasks.
Offers an optional Chrome extension and an MCP server for outside control.

repositories.title: IceWhaleTech / CasaOS
repositories.description: CasaOS - A simple, easy-to-use, elegant open-source Personal Cloud system.
repositories.summary: A personal cloud platform for home and small-organization use. Focuses on local data ownership, low-cost self-hosting, and app management. Provides a friendly UI for installing and managing common home-server apps. Supports multiple devices and operating systems, including Raspberry Pi and Ubuntu.
summary_bullets: A personal cloud platform for home and small-organization use.
Focuses on local data ownership, low-cost self-hosting, and app management.
Provides a friendly UI for installing and managing common home-server apps.
Supports multiple devices and operating systems, including Raspberry Pi and Ubuntu.

repositories.title: opendatalab / MinerU
repositories.description: Transforms complex documents like PDFs and Office docs into LLM-ready markdown/JSON for your Agentic workflows.
repositories.summary: A document parsing engine that converts PDFs, office files, images, and web pages into structured Markdown or JSON. Targets LLM, RAG, and agent workflows that need high-accuracy document extraction. Supports OCR, layout reconstruction, formulas, tables, and many languages. Offers desktop, web, CLI, API, MCP, and offline deployment options.
summary_bullets: A document parsing engine that converts PDFs, office files, images, and web pages into structured Markdown or JSON.
Targets LLM, RAG, and agent workflows that need high-accuracy document extraction.
Supports OCR, layout reconstruction, formulas, tables, and many languages.
Offers desktop, web, CLI, API, MCP, and offline deployment options.

repositories.title: Free-TV / IPTV
repositories.description: M3U Playlist for free TV channels
repositories.summary: A curated M3U playlist of free TV channels from around the world. Focuses on working, mainstream, free-to-air or freely available channels. Aims to keep the list small, high quality, and mostly HD. Provides sourcing and contribution rules for maintaining channel listings.
summary_bullets: A curated M3U playlist of free TV channels from around the world.
Focuses on working, mainstream, free-to-air or freely available channels.
Aims to keep the list small, high quality, and mostly HD.
Provides sourcing and contribution rules for maintaining channel listings.

repositories.title: shanraisshan / claude-code-best-practice
repositories.description: from vibe coding to agentic engineering - practice makes claude perfect
repositories.summary: A collection of best practices for using Claude Code and related agent workflows. Covers agents, commands, skills, hooks, memory, MCP servers, plugins, and automation patterns. Includes workflow tips for planning, code review, testing, and cross-model collaboration. Acts as a reference for building disciplined AI-assisted development setups.
summary_bullets: A collection of best practices for using Claude Code and related agent workflows.
Covers agents, commands, skills, hooks, memory, MCP servers, plugins, and automation patterns.
Includes workflow tips for planning, code review, testing, and cross-model collaboration.
Acts as a reference for building disciplined AI-assisted development setups.

repositories.title: NanmiCoder / MediaCrawler
repositories.description: 小红书笔记 | 评论爬虫、抖音视频 | 评论爬虫、快手视频 | 评论爬虫、B 站视频 ｜ 评论爬虫、微博帖子 ｜ 评论爬虫、百度贴吧帖子 ｜ 百度贴吧评论回复爬虫 | 知乎问答文章｜评论爬虫
repositories.summary: A multi-platform crawler for collecting public content from major Chinese social and content platforms. Supports keyword search, post detail scraping, comment collection, creator pages, and login-state reuse. Uses Playwright and browser sessions to reduce the need for reverse engineering signatures. Includes a web UI, multiple storage formats, and a pro version with expanded workflow support.
summary_bullets: A multi-platform crawler for collecting public content from major Chinese social and content platforms.
Supports keyword search, post detail scraping, comment collection, creator pages, and login-state reuse.
Uses Playwright and browser sessions to reduce the need for reverse engineering signatures.
Includes a web UI, multiple storage formats, and a pro version with expanded workflow support.
